items.name: face-id-backend
items.description: This is demo of face recoginition system backend,  based on openface, django-rest, dlib and opencv, img encoded in base64

items.name: demo_android_base64_image
items.description: Demo encode and decode base64 to and from image file

items.name: base64_image_carrierwave
items.description: A demo project to save base64 encoded image into file.

items.name: Csharp-Python-Base64-encoder-decoder-IronPython
items.description: Base64 encode/decode demo with C# and IronPython.

items.name: ton-transfer-demo
items.description: Python script for converting TonConnect transactions (Base64-encoded cells) into tonutils objects and sending them via TON SDK. Supports test mode for checking transactions without sending.

items.name: Quantum-Powered-File-Encryption-Simulator-
items.description: Quantum-Powered File Encryption Simulator A Streamlit app that demonstrates secure file encryption and decryption using quantum key distribution (BB84 protocol) or Base64 encoding. Generate quantum keys, encrypt files, for demo purposes.

items.name: Storing-images-in-MongoDB-using-NodeJS
items.description: Presented a demo where the back end of the proposed system used node.js script to store data in mongo database. Implemented the base64 method to encode the image, then stored it using mongo’s BinData type as a BSON bit array. This approach utilized 20% less space than the original binary image and also resulted in a 10x increase in server’s responsiveness.
